// Jest Snapshot v1, https://goo.gl/fbAQLP exports[`createGlobalStyles regular 1`] = `" html, body{background:dodgerblue;}"`; exports[`createGlobalStyles regular 2`] = `"<div></div>"`; exports[`createGlobalStyles with theme 1`] = `"html, body{margin:0;background:blue;}"`; exports[`createGlobalStyles with theme 2`] = `"<div></div>"`;
